name: CHECKROWUSESBREF
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[CHECKROWUSESBREF] ON [dbo].[SIPARISFISLERI]
AFTER DELETE 
AS 
BEGIN
    SET NOCOUNT ON;     
	IF EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM STOKHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF IN (SELECT SB_REF FROM deleted))
	begin rollback transaction RAISERROR ('SB_REF in use.' , 16, 1) end
	IF EXISTS ( SELECT * FROM PLANLAMAHAREKETLERI WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE SB_REF IN (SELECT SB_REF FROM deleted))
	begin rollback transaction RAISERROR ('SB_REF in use.' , 16, 1) end
END
